records.profile_description: A lexical predicate followed by overt 完 as a completion or phase marker, optionally with an overt object. The resulting VP may occur inside independently represented negation, outer-perfective, clause-linking, or final-未 question structure. The profile excludes 晒 and other completion or result markers, and it does not treat outer 咗 or final 未 as part of this UUID or assume that V完咗O is uniformly natural across speakers and contexts.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for the V + 完 completion profile; remove 晒 and other marker-specific branches from this UUID during compatibility migration and keep the native-conflicted V完咗O composition under the project's higher-burden evidence rule

additional_research: The source record distinguishes verbal particle 完 from outer aspect 咗 and from experiential 過. The executable suite also labels 做晒, so the current runtime umbrella is broader than the supported V + 完 profile.
Published V完咗O attestations remain subject to the project's native-conflict escalation rule and do not establish uniform naturalness.

successor_profiles: other independently evidenced result or phase markers
records.rationale: CompletionVP is too broad because its current positives combine the source-supported V + 完 predicate with 晒, outer 咗, final-未 questions, negation, and larger clause-linking contexts. The outer structures may contain the same V + 完 constituent without belonging to its permanent identity. WanMarkedCompletionVP retains the dominant source-supported core while preventing 晒 and unrelated completion markers from inheriting its evidence.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations for the 完 and 晒 branches
remove 晒 and other marker-specific matches from this UUID during compatibility migration
define objectless and overt-object boundaries for V + 完
classify diverse corpus candidates separately for bare V完, V完O, and V完咗O
resolve the native-conflicted V完咗O subtype through independent sources, controlled contrasts, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: A clause contains an overt coverb followed by its NP complement before an independently analyzed VP, currently exemplified by locative 喺 + NP and participant-marking 同 + NP. The profile records the shared preverbal structure without assigning one semantic relation to all coverbs. It excludes conjunction 同, postverbal result-location phrases, bare locative phrases without a following VP, and unrestricted licensing of every coverb lexeme or ordering.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending as a bounded preverbal coverb-NP structural profile; require marker-specific semantic and lexical evidence before any productive promotion

additional_research: Francis and Matthews explicitly analyze a Cantonese coverb construction, while Kwan distinguishes preverbal event-location from postverbal result-location placement.
The 同 sources support several lexical relations and therefore justify the structural coverb profile only when conjunction and other 同 uses remain explicitly excluded.

source_terms.term: 同 as with or together with
同 as 跟 or 替

records.rationale: CoverbFrame names a documented structural family, but Frame is vague and the runtime supports only a bounded preverbal coverb + NP + VP profile. PreverbalCoverbNPClause exposes the observable order and keeps the common structure separate from marker-specific semantic roles. The same UUID can be retained because the locative 喺 and participant-marking 同 examples share the source-recognized coverb configuration; their lexical meanings remain independently constrained.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations and marker inventory
add focused source-linked positives and conjunction/postverbal-location boundaries
audit 同 tokens for conjunction, comitative, addressee, and benefactive ambiguity
test time, focus, manner, and coverb ordering without assuming free permutation
complete reviewed corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An overt action predicate is followed by a property or manner expression and 啲, as in 行快啲, 講慢啲, and 講大聲啲. The profile excludes preposed 啲-marked manner expressions, standalone or elliptical property + 啲 directives such as 客氣啲 and 快啲, and discourse-separated material whose attachment to a following VP is not established.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for the postverbal V + property + 啲 profile; move standalone or elliptical property + 啲 outputs to independently adjudicated profiles during compatibility migration

additional_research: The checked sources directly attest postverbal 講慢啲 and 行快啲, while the Wong example explicitly treats 靜啲 as a separate discourse unit rather than an adverb attached to the following event.
The executable suite additionally labels standalone 唔該你快啲 and 客氣啲, so the current UUID is broader than the postverbal manner-adjustment construction.

records.rationale: The legacy name does not distinguish postverbal manner adjustment from standalone scalar directives. Three executable positives instantiate a coherent and directly attested V + property + 啲 profile, while the remaining positives lack an overt modified verb. PostverbalDiMannerAdjustmentVP retains the source-supported core and prevents directive or discourse-unit evidence from being transferred into the adverbial construction.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations for postverbal and standalone branches
separate standalone 快啲 and 客氣啲 from the postverbal UUID
define the licensed property and action classes without a lexical whitelist
add focused attachment and word-order boundaries against the preposed AA38 wrapper
complete reviewed corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: Overt 好 directly modifies an independently licensed property or stative predicate in copula-less predication, optionally with an overt subject, topic, or embedding clause, as in 今日好凍, 佢好高, and 我覺得佢好開心. The profile excludes 幾耐 and 幾多 quantity or duration expressions, 好 modifying material inside a nominal phrase such as 好大壓力, and any claim that every degree marker or lexicalized 好-X expression belongs to this UUID.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending for overt 好 + property predication; remove wh-quantity, duration, nominal-modifier, and other unrelated degree branches during compatibility migration

additional_research: The grammar synopsis supports copula-less property predicates with overt degree modification, and the segmentation source independently treats 好 as a separate degree word.
The executable suite also assigns this label to 幾耐, 幾多, 幾多年前, and 好大壓力, which do not all instantiate the same property-predicate construction.

source_terms.term: predicative adjectives are verb-like and degree-modified

records.rationale: DegreeStativePredicate contains a strong and repeatedly tested 好 + property-predicate core, but its runtime positives also include wh-duration, wh-quantity, and nominal-modifier material. HouMarkedPropertyPredicate identifies the dominant source-supported construction without claiming that all degree expressions are stative predicates. The same UUID is retained for the 好-marked predicative core; unrelated branches require independent homes.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations and degree-marker inventory
remove 幾耐, 幾多, and nominal-modifier branches from this UUID
define independently licensed property predicates and distinguish lexicalized 好-X expressions
add focused copular, nominal, eventive, and degree-question boundaries
complete corpus review, role-neutral panel evidence, and held-out validation

records.profile_description: An overt subject is followed by lexical 想 and a visible VP complement, as in 我想去 and 我想講吓. The profile excludes 要 + VP obligation or desire readings, 想 + NP, 諗住 + VP, and any topic or coverb material outside the 想-complement core.
records.status_recommendation: retain research_pending under the lexeme-specific 想 + VP identity; keep 要 and other desire, obligation, intention, or preference predicates in separate profiles

additional_research: Luke and Nancarrow treat 想 and 要 as frequent modal auxiliaries but explicitly distinguish their distributions and central meanings. Every current positive for this UUID contains 想 + a visible VP complement, while 要 + VP is an executable boundary.

records.rationale: DesiderativeVP is semantically plausible but too broad because the evidence distinguishes 想, 要, and other desire or obligation expressions rather than licensing one interchangeable desiderative marker. The runtime positives consistently instantiate overt subject + 想 + VP, so the permanent identity is narrowed and renamed to that lexical complement profile without changing its UUID.
unresolved_blockers: record exact runtime locations
verify the tested complement classes and subject requirements against exact source examples
separate 想 + NP and omitted-subject profiles if the runtime later recognizes them
add focused boundaries against 要, 諗住, 鍾意, and preference constructions
complete reviewed corpus, role-neutral panel, and held-out validation
